  • Method Details

    • getGrammar

      public AbstractGrammar getGrammar()

    • getSourceLocation

      public SourceLocation getSourceLocation()
      Makes a source location starting from the position where the latest call to a subparse() method occurred, ending at the end position of the previous token (before current token t).
      Returns:
      a source location

    • syntaxError

      public GenParser.SyntaxError syntaxError(ASTProblem problem) throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError

    • takeProblem

      public ASTProblem takeProblem()
      Returns the problem of the currently thrown syntax error. Returned problem is no more available hereafter.
      Returns:
      an AST problem

    • isParsingType

      public boolean isParsingType()

    • startParsingType

      public void startParsingType()

    • stopParsingType

      public void stopParsingType()

    • peek

      public Token peek()
      Returns the following token in the token stream from the underlying scanner. The first returned token is the one just after the lookahead token la. The peek mechanism is reset by the next call to one of the accept method.
      Returns:
      the next token beyond the lookahead

    • resetPeek

      public void resetPeek()
      Reset the scanner as if no peek() had been called.

    • accept

      public void accept(int expectedKind) throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Checks that the expected token with the given kind is ahead, then makes progress.
      Parameters:
      expectedKind - kind of the expected token
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError - in case an unexpected token is ahead

    • acceptOpenParen

      public void acceptOpenParen() throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError

    • acceptCloseParen

      public void acceptCloseParen() throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError

    • getLedParser

      public ILedParser<? extends Formula<?>> getLedParser()

    • getBoundIndex

      public int getBoundIndex(String name)

    • giveProgressDirection

      public org.eventb.internal.core.parser.GenParser.ProgressDirection giveProgressDirection() throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Returns whether the current token allows to progress right in the parsing.

      It is true iff the current token:

    • is an operator
    • is compatible with the current parent operator
    • has a higher priority than the current parent operator

      • Returns:
      true if right progressing is allowed by the grammar.
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError - if current operator is incompatible with current parent operator

    • subParseRes

      public <T> IParserPrinter.SubParseResult<? extends T> subParseRes(INudParser<T> parser, boolean isRightChild) throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Throws:
      GenParser.SyntaxError

      public <T> T subParse(INudParser<T> parser, boolean isRightChild) throws GenParser.SyntaxError
      Throws:
